command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '===A: LOCAL MAIN HEAD AND LAST 5 COMMITS==='
git log --oneline -5

echo '===B: CURRENT BRANCH==='
git branch --show-current

echo '===C: WAVE1 TAG TARGETS==='
git rev-parse wave1-rollback-baseline 2>/dev/null || echo 'TAG_MISSING: wave1-rollback-baseline'
git rev-parse wave1-complete-v1.0.0 2>/dev/null || echo 'TAG_MISSING: wave1-complete-v1.0.0'
echo 'rollback-baseline points to commit:'
git log --oneline -1 wave1-rollback-baseline 2>/dev/null
echo 'complete-v1.0.0 points to commit:'
git log --oneline -1 wave1-complete-v1.0.0 2>/dev/null

echo '===D: UNCOMMITTED FILES==='
git status --short

echo '===E: GITEA REMOTE HEAD==='
git ls-remote http://044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6@192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI refs/heads/main 2>&1

ENDSSH
